title: 블랙핑크, 월드투어 서울 공연 확정
summary: K팝 그룹 블랙핑크가 월드투어 'BORN PINK'의 서울 공연 일정을 확정했습니다.
content: Blackpink confirmed their Seoul concert dates for the BORN PINK world tour. The announcement caused immediate celebration among fans worldwide. Tickets are expected to sell out within minutes. The group prepared special stages exclusively for Seoul concerts. New songs from their latest album will be performed. Local fashion brands are collaborating on tour merchandise. The concert venue will accommodate over 60,000 fans. Global streaming platforms will broadcast the event live. Tourism sector expects economic boost from international visitors. Social media trending has already begun.
